Guided demo launcher · no account · no wallet · no network

Run the right proof path
for every user.

This new Flight Deck turns the repository into a clear, autonomous experience for both non-technical and advanced visitors. Pick a journey, filter by audience, preview the selected page live, then launch or export a public-safe JourneyReceipt.

Do not enter personal, confidential, customer, regulated, wallet, seed, or private-key information. This surface is entirely browser-local and public-safe.

Posture
No wallet
Never connects, approves, signs, or broadcasts.
Privacy
No user data wanted
No accounts, forms, analytics, or cookies.
Autonomy
Runs in-browser
Guided journeys work without infrastructure.
Authority
Human bounded
No production authority or factual overclaiming.
3guided journeys
fast, builder, and boundary-first
13demonstrations
linked into coherent user paths
100%browser-local
same-origin, static, and public-safe
0external dependencies
registry-free and workflow-safe

5-minute proof path

Evidence Docket Composer

Build the proof room before the claim.
